positive: A minimalist and sophisticated abstract representation of cosmic energy and deep-sea flora, rendered in the style of linocut and abstract graphic design. The central composition features interlocking, stylized geometric shapes that resemble constellations or unfurling nautilus shells, contrasting sharply with flowing, bioluminescent liquid elements. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, ethereal cyan, glowing lime green, and pure white, allowing negative space to define the structure. The overall design must be highly scalable and print-ready, with crisp edges and bold silhouettes, suitable for a central apparel graphic. Overhead view, vector art quality, maximum visual impact, no gradients or smoky transitions.
